name: Versor Inc.
values: Extreme focus on user experience (UX) and intuitive design
constraints: Lean engineering team (2-4 developers typically per project)
Tight cloud infrastructure budget for early-stage prototypes
targetAudience: Mid-market enterprise teams digitizing old workflows
designSystem: Minimalist aesthetic with dark modes by default
Pill-shaped UI elements for soft interactions
Heavy reliance on Arial and legible sans-serif typography
